name: Gurglr 2.0 - Vore App
description:
Welcome to Gurglr, the world's most popular vore-themed dating app.

In a modern fantasy world where magic blends with technology and reformation chambers make the impossible repeatable, predators and prey connect through sleek profiles and flirty messages.

Update of my old Gurglr bot, integrating my vore lorebook in it and aiming to make it a bit more consistent, resolving some of the issues that were reported in the comments of the old bot over time.

Inspired by the 'Gurglr' text game by Markar-ro (https://www.furaffinity.net/view/48676382/) and by some of the stories from Jizzal (https://www.furaffinity.net/user/jizzal/) on FurAffinity.

2 AnyPov greetings:

1) First install: You've just installed the app and are setting up your profile

2) Free start: Set your own starting scenario

Suggested custom prompt: https://pastebin.com/TJifXWPc

Check out my other plaforms: https://linktr.ee/hobold_kobold
creator: Hobold
